creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: garga
Date: Wed Apr 25 19:03:15 UTC 2018
New revision: 468289
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/468289

Log:
  Clixon is a CLI/network interfaced configuration database tool

  Using Clixon you can create CLI, RESTCONF, and NETCONF interfaces to manage a
  configuration database. It also provides the mechanism to validate and configure
  system components.

  WWW: http://www.clicon.org/

  PR:		227681
  Submitted by:	dcornejo@netgate.com
  Sponsored by:	Rubicon Communications, LLC (Netgate)

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/clixon/
  head/devel/clixon/Makefile
  head/devel/clixon/distinfo
  head/devel/clixon/files/
  head/devel/clixon/files/patch-apps_netconf_Makefile.in
  head/devel/clixon/files/patch-apps_restconf_Makefile.in
  head/devel/clixon/pkg-descr
  head/devel/clixon/pkg-plist
